description: This instrumentation enriches HTTP server spans with route information for Spring WebMVC 3.1+. It also enables controller spans (controller spans are disabled by default) and view spans (view spans are disabled by default).

configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.spring-webmvc.experimental-span-attributes
configurations.description: Enables the capture of experimental span attributes `spring-webmvc.view.name` and `spring-webmvc.view.type`.

configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.common.experimental.controller-telemetry.enabled
configurations.description: Enables the creation of experimental controller spans.

configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.common.experimental.view-telemetry.enabled
configurations.description: Enables the creation of experimental view spans.
